## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run check` passes
- [ ] `bun run --filter '@sveltry/protocol' test` passes (if protocol touched)
- [ ] `bun run build` passes
- [ ] Added a changeset (`bunx changeset`) if a published package changed
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] No em/en dashes or emojis introduced
